messages.content: 帮我翻译一下以下段落
请提供需要翻译的段落，以便我能够帮助您进行翻译。
在传统的纳米孔实验中，通常会研究单向驱动电压下穿孔信号的阻孔深度（△I）和驻留时间（△t）（即散点图），以及电流信号直方统计图，来研究分析物的种类、构型等特征。

In traditional nanopore experiments, researchers typically study the blockade depth (ΔI) and residence time (Δt) of pore-current signals under a unidirectional driving voltage (i.e., scatter plots), as well as the histogram of current signals. These analyses are performed to investigate characteristics of analytes such as their types and configurations.
在传统的纳米孔实验中，研究者通常研究单向驱动电压下易位事件的电流阻断()和易位时间()(即散点图)，以及电流信号的直方图。从而分析穿孔分子的种类和构型等特征。

In traditional nanopore experiments, researchers typically study the current blockade (ΔI) and dwell time (Δt) of translocation events under a unidirectional driving voltage (i.e., scatter plots), as well as the histogram of current signals. These analyses are performed to analyze characteristics of translocating molecules, including their types and configurations.

In traditional nanopore experiments, researchers typically study the current blockade() and translocation time() (i.e., scatter plot) of translocation events under a unidirectional driving voltage , as well as the histogram of current signals, to analyze characteristics of translocating molecules including their types and configurations.
在传统的纳米孔实验中，研究者通常通过对单向驱动电压下易位事件的电流阻断（ΔI）和易位时间（Δt）（即散点图）进行研究分析，以及对电流信号的直方图进行分析，来分析易位分子的特征，包括其种类和构型。
在传统的纳米孔实验中，研究者通常通过对单向驱动电压下易位事件的电流阻断（ΔI）和易位时间（Δt）（即散点图）进行研究分析，以及对电流信号的直方图进行分析，来分析易位分子的特征，包括其种类和构型。

In traditional nanopore experiments, researchers typically analyze the current blockade (ΔI) and translocation time (Δt) of translocation events under a unidirectional driving voltage (i.e., scatter plot), as well as analyze the histogram of current signals to understand the characteristics of translocating molecules, including their types and configurations.
如2003年，Li等人利用3nm和10nm大小的氮化硅纳米孔对双链DNA的折叠和非折叠构型进行了研究（[1-2]一句话总结文章）；2010年Cess dekker等人通过识别纳米孔信号中的尖刺，来直接观察任意长度的线性和圆形单个DNA分子中的单个结。2016年Plesa等人通过散点图能够清晰的识别出1kbp DNA ladder中10种不同长度的DNA分子（0.5–10 kbp）。

In 2003, Li et al. studied the folding and unfolding configurations of double-stranded DNA using 3nm and 10nm-sized silicon nitride nanopores. [1-2] One sentence summary of the article. In 2010, Cess Dekker et al. directly observed individual structures within linear and circular single DNA molecules of any length by identifying spikes in the nanopore signal. In 2016, Plesa et al. were able to accurately identify 10 different lengths of DNA molecules ranging from 0.5-10 kbp in a 1 kbp DNA ladder using scatter plots.
2003年，Li等人利用3nm和10nm尺寸的氮化硅纳米孔研究了双链DNA的折叠和非折叠构型[1]。2010年，Cess Dekker等人通过识别纳米孔信号中的短尖峰，直接观察到任意长度的单个DNA分子中的单个结[2]。2016年，Plesa等人从散点图中可以清晰识别出1 kbp DNA阶梯中0.5-10 kbp不等的10个不同长度的DNA分子。

In 2003, Li et al. studied the folding and unfolding configurations of double-stranded DNA using 3nm and 10nm-sized silicon nitride nanopores [1]. In 2010, Cess Dekker et al. directly observed individual structures within single DNA molecules of any length by identifying short spikes in the nanopore signal [2]. In 2016, Plesa et al. were able to clearly identify 10 different lengths of DNA molecules ranging from 0.5-10 kbp in a 1 kbp DNA ladder using scatter plots.
在这些工作以及其他研究中，尤其是利用微加工技术制备的固态纳米孔（如氮化硅纳米孔、二维材料纳米孔等）和玻璃纳米孔，散点图的分布往往是双曲线型。原因在于，在这些情景下，分子在孔内是自由易位。

In these works and other studies, especially those using microfabricated solid-state nanopores (such as silicon nitride nanopores, two-dimensional material nanopores, etc.), as well as glass nanopores, the scatter plot distribution often follows a hyperbolic shape. This is because, in these scenarios, the molecules inside the pore experience free translocation.
在上述这些工作以及其他研究中，尤其是利用微加工技术（如TEM，FIB等）制备的固态纳米孔（如氮化硅纳米孔、二维材料纳米孔等）和玻璃纳米孔，散点图的分布往往是双曲线型。原因在于，在这些情景下，分子在孔内是自由易位。

In the above-mentioned works and other studies, particularly those using microfabrication techniques like TEM (Transmission Electron Microscopy), FIB (Focused Ion Beam), etc., to prepare solid-state nanopores (such as silicon nitride nanopores, two-dimensional material nanopores, etc.), as well as glass nanopores, the scatter plot distribution often follows a hyperbolic shape. This is because, in these scenarios, the molecules inside the pore undergo free translocation.

In the above-mentioned works and other studies, particularly those using solid-state nanopores (such as silicon nitride nanopores, two-dimensional material nanopores, etc.) fabricated by micro-fabrication techniques like TEM (Transmission Electron Microscopy), FIB (Focused Ion Beam), etc., as well as glass nanopores, the scatter plot distribution often follows a hyperbolic shape. This is because, in these scenarios, the molecules inside the pore undergo free translocation.
在上述提到的研究以及其他的研究中，尤其是使用TEM（透射电子显微镜）、FIB（聚焦离子束）等微加工技术制备的固态纳米孔（如氮化硅纳米孔、二维材料纳米孔等）以及玻璃纳米孔，散点图的分布通常呈现双曲线形状。这是因为在这些情境下，分子在纳米孔内自由进行易位。
在上述提到的研究以及其他的研究中，尤其是使用TEM（透射电子显微镜）、FIB（聚焦离子束）等微加工技术制备的固态纳米孔（如氮化硅纳米孔、二维材料纳米孔等）以及玻璃纳米孔，散点图的分布通常呈现双曲线形状。这是因为在这些情境下，分子在纳米孔内自由进行易位。

In the mentioned studies and other research, particularly those utilizing microfabrication techniques like TEM (Transmission Electron Microscopy), FIB (Focused Ion Beam), etc., to fabricate solid-state nanopores (such as silicon nitride nanopores, two-dimensional material nanopores, etc.), as well as glass nanopores, the distribution of scatter plots often exhibits a hyperbolic shape. This is because, in these scenarios, the molecules inside the nanopores have the freedom to translocate.
在孔径大小允许的情况下，分子如DNA分子在穿孔时会发生折叠。自由穿孔情况下，对于分子的折叠部分，净电作用力和粘滞阻力都加倍。这使得分子的折叠部分通过孔的速度与未展开部分的速度相同。折叠分子的移位时间减少和电流阻塞增加的补偿效应意味着，所有相同长度的分子，无论折叠与否，都会产生面积(与基线电流偏差的时间积分)相等的电流迹线。这一区域被定义为事件电荷赤字，ecd。

When molecules, such as DNA, translocate through a pore, they may undergo folding if the pore size permits. Under free translocation conditions, the folding portion of the molecule experiences twice the net electrical force and viscous resistance. This results in the folded region of the molecule translocating at the same velocity as the unfolded region. The compensatory effect of reduced translocation time for folded molecules and increased current blockade implies that all molecules of the same length, regardless of folding, generate current traces with equal area (time integral of deviation from baseline current). This region is defined as the event charge deficit, ECD.
当分子，如DNA，通过一个孔转移时，如果孔的大小允许，它们可能会发生折叠。在自由易位条件下，分子的折叠部分经历两倍的净电作用力和粘性阻力。这导致分子的折叠区域以与未折叠区域相同的速度转移。折叠分子易位时间的缩短和电流阻断的增加所产生的补偿效应意味着，所有相同长度的分子，无论折叠与否，都会产生面积相等的电流迹线(偏离基线电流的时间积分)。这个区域被定义为事件电荷赤字，ECD。
当分子（如DNA）通过一个允许的孔径转移时，如果合适，它们可能会发生折叠。在自由转移条件下，折叠部分的分子经历两倍的净电场力和粘滞阻力。这使得折叠部分与展开部分以相同的速度穿越孔道。折叠分子易位时间的缩短和电流阻断的增加相互抵消，这意味着所有长度相等的分子，无论是否折叠，都会生成相等面积（基线电流偏差的时间积分）的电流曲线。这一区域被称为事件电荷赤字（ECD）。
当分子，如DNA，通过一个孔转移时，如果孔的大小允许，它们可能会发生折叠。在自由易位条件下，分子的折叠部分经历两倍的净电作用力和粘性阻力。这导致分子的折叠区域以与未折叠区域相同的速度转移。折叠分子易位时间的缩短和电流阻断的增加所产生的补偿效应意味着，所有相同长度的分子，无论折叠与否，都会产生面积相等的电流迹线(偏离基线电流的时间积分)。这个区域被定义为事件电荷赤字，ECD。

When molecules, such as DNA, translocate through a pore, they may undergo folding if the pore size allows. Under free translocation conditions, the folded portion of the molecule experiences twice the net electrical force and viscous resistance. This results in the folded region translocating at the same velocity as the unfolded region. The compensatory effect of reduced translocation time for folded molecules and increased current blockade implies that all molecules of the same length, regardless of folding, generate current traces with equal area (integral of deviation from baseline current over time). This region is defined as the event charge deficit, ECD.
在自由易位条件下，分子的折叠部分感受到的净电作用力和粘滞阻力都会加倍。
Under free translocation conditions, the folded portion of a molecule experiences doubled net electrical force and viscous resistance.
这意味着，在分子自由易位的情形下，其ecd是恒定的，在散点图中表现为双曲线型。
是的，这意味着在分子自由易位的情况下，事件电荷赤字（ECD）是恒定的，因此在散点图中表现为双曲线形状。
这意味着，在分子自由易位的情形下，其ecd是恒定的，在散点图中表现为双曲线型。
是的，正如您所说，在分子自由易位的情况下，事件电荷赤字（ECD）是恒定的，在散点图中呈现出双曲线形状。

这意味着，在分子自由易位的情形下，其ecd是恒定的，在散点图中表现为双曲线型。
This means that, in the case of free translocation of molecules, the event charge deficit (ECD) remains constant, and it is manifested as a hyperbolic shape in the scatter plot.
This means that in the scenario of free translocation of molecules, the event charge deficit (ECD) remains constant and is represented as a hyperbolic shape in the scatter plot.
然而，上述论点仅适用于分子自由易位的情形，即具有粘度限制的分子通过孔的运动，分子不会粘在纳米孔表面。

However, the aforementioned argument only applies to the scenario of free translocation of molecules, where the movement of molecules through the pore is not hindered by viscosity, and the molecules do not stick to the surface of the nanopore.
然而，上述结论仅适用于分子自由移位的情况，在这种情况下，分子通过孔的运动不受粘度的阻碍，分子不粘附在纳米孔的表面。
